description: VERIFIED LIVE: CNN via content-script DOM extraction — no login, no API key. CNN renders story cards as [data-component-name="card"] with a .container__headline-text, so this tool reads them straight from the DOM of your open CNN tab. Navigate the tab to cnn.com or any section (/world, /politics, /business, …) and call the tool. Tested live by Claude Code on /world: 93 stories with headline and article url extracted correctly.

tools.name: cnn_headlines
tools.description: Story cards on the current CNN page (cnn.com or any section/topic). Navigate the tab there first. Returns each story's headline and article url. VERIFIED (93 stories).
